primary_intent: Defense autonomy / drones / counter-UAS value-capture screen
secondary_intents: Produce theme-to-company handoff candidates (AVAV, KTOS, PLTR, LMT, RTX, NOC)
Separate funded programs-of-record from policy priority and prototype awards
execution_order: setup -> theme-to-company handoff -> six-lens test -> trigger overlays -> build evidence log -> ordinary-vs-workflow delta -> decision -> refresh plan
market_scope: US-listed public equities plus private defense-technology read-throughs
routing_basis: The topic translates defense urgency into public-company value capture and depends on budget, program status, contract type, production ramp, compliance, allied sales and valuation expectations.
routing_mismatch_risk: A single-equity memo could overstate actionability if policy priority and prototype awards are not separated from funded programs and delivery economics.
expected_output_package: hot-theme value-capture screen (value-capture-map.csv, government-procurement-program-check.csv, evidence-log.csv, methodology-delta.md)
followup_questions: Complete expectation maps for AVAV/KTOS/PLTR before any actionability?
Confirm funded program-of-record path vs Replicator-style attritable awards in the value-capture map?
